name: Gotify
short_description: Self-hosted push notification server for sending alerts from your scripts and apps.
description: Gotify is a self-hosted push notification server for sending real-time alerts via REST and WebSocket. It supports multiple users/apps, message priorities, file attachments, and a web UI—useful for monitoring alerts, automation scripts, and system notifications.
usecases: Receive alerts from Uptime Kuma when services go down.
Send notifications from your automation scripts (n8n, Home Assistant).
Get notified when Docker containers stop or crash.
Use as a simple messaging system for family or team.
notes: Simple REST API for sending messages
Supports multiple apps with different tokens
